message.content:
Who We Serve
From Govt.
to Corporate

If you need a compliant, resilient IT infrastructure and a single partner accountable for uptime across PAN India.

Corporate
& Enterprise
1. End-to-end IT infrastructure design & deployment
2. Rapid-response AMC & FMS contracts
3. Cybersecurity, endpoint & cloud protection
4. Chip-level repair to extend asset lifecycle

Trusted by: TATA | Poonawalla | Serum | Marriott | Jupiter Hospita & many more.

If you require GEM-compliant procurement, strict data security, and ISO-certified service delivery across PAN India.

Government
& Semi-Govt
1. Full Government e-Marketplace (GEM) compliance
2. ISO 27001 data security protocols
3. Fully transparent pricing
4. Nationwide logistics and support SLAs

Trusted by: DRDO | HAL | RBI | SBI | BSNL & many more.

If you want access to 200+ renowned brands with reliable supply chains and award-winning logistics support.

Channel
& Authorised
Service
Partners
1. 10,000+ active channel partner network across Maharashtra and Goa
2. On-time replacement and logistics guarantee
3. We are the authorised service partners of HP, Asus and Acer.
